case_title: OSGOOD, DAVID P. VS BRAUDE, MICHAEL (OWNER & MANAGER) et al

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $618.79 FILED BY OSGOOD, DAVID P. AS TO DEFENDANT BRAUDE, MICHAEL    (OWNER & MANAGER) A-PLUS ELECTRONICS ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-11-1994 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 07

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF OSGOOD, DAVID P. IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT A-PLUS ELECTRONICS DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE AGAINST MICHAEL BRAUDE STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL
CERT. RECEIPT TO MICHAEL BRAUDE RETURNED SIGNED.
